name: Bargainer Ultra Modern Floor
thumb_image_alt_tag: Gallery Cover Pic of Bargainer Ultra Modern Floor
description:
Bargainer Ultra Modern Floor is a residential project in Sector 46, Gurgaon. Bargainer Ultra Modern Floor offers Apartment. Available configurations include 3 BHK, 4 BHK. Apartment, as per the area plan, are in the size range of 1900.0 - 4000.0 sq.ft.. The property is Ready to Move. The project was launched in December 2022 and possession date of Bargainer Ultra Modern Floor is Jun, 2023. Bargainer Ultra Modern Floor is located in Sector 46. The project is developed by Bargainer Propmart.

Bargainer Ultra Modern Floor is equipped with various resident-centric amenities that includes Power Backup. The property is equipped with Fire Sprinklers. Enjoy a class-apart lifestyle at Bargainer Ultra Modern Floor.

This project meets all mandates as required by the state authority. RERA ID of Bargainer Ultra Modern Floor is Rera Not Applicable.

Located close to prominent suburbs of Gurgaon, the area of Sector 46 has prominent schools and hospitals within a close distance.
title: 3, 4 BHK Builder Floors
